title: Growth Gateway: Laos sustainability opportunities
body: "This slide deck was prepared by the Growth Gateway programme team in collaboration with the Boston Consulting Group. It aims to support stakeholders in understanding how Laos could unlock over £270 million in GDP and create up to 55,000 jobs by 2030 through targeted green investments in agriculture, energy, and industry.  The document analyses climate investment sectors, maps the socio-economic impact and potential benefits of certain actions, and provides recommendations for government and development partners.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
